title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT Realtime 2.0, Translate, And Whisper Concept Coverage
summary: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for May 2026 point to GPT Realtime 2.0 preview, GPT Realtime Translate, and GPT Realtime Whisper concept coverage for low-latency audio translation and transcription workflows.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Microsoft Learn page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Treat this as a documentation-level availability signal and verify model access, regions, and pricing before routing production audio workflows.

detail.migration_notes: The source entry is documentation/concept coverage, so APW marks confidence high rather than confirmed and recommends access verification.

limitations: This is a documentation-level signal from the Azure OpenAI what's-new page, not a fully verified production availability matrix.
